title: The Universe Speaks
description: The universe speaks, whether we choose to listen or not. Just Improv's 'spectacular' long-form improvised comedy finds the humour in our fascination with superstition, belief and fate. You are the Universe. You will guide our characters through sliding doors moments that could change their lives forever. How would your life be different if you listened to the signs around you? Just Improv have been showcasing their 'wild wit' since 2022, performing sell-out shows at Brighton, Camden and Edinburgh Fringe Festivals. Just Improv regularly host a Games Night to connect with other improv groups across London.
content_warnings: The show is improvised, so whilst we cannot guarantee any specific content warnings, our intention is that the show will be suitable for 12+ audiences
